services.title: Track Construction & Maintenance
services.description: Comprehensive track laying, welding, and ongoing maintenance for high-speed and freight railways.

services.title: Railway Electrification
services.description: Overhead line equipment (OLE) installation, substations, and power distribution systems.

services.title: Signaling & Telecommunications
services.description: Advanced signaling systems, ERTMS implementation, and secure railway communication networks.

certifications: We are proud to be an ISO 9001:2015, ISO 14001:2015, and ISO 45001:2018 certified railway infrastructure contractor. Our commitment to quality, environmental management, and occupational health and safety is unwavering. All our projects comply with international railway standards (IRS) and local regulatory requirements.
